items.title: Introducing gpt-image-2 Official Model in Nexior 🎉
items.summary: This update adds the official variant of the gpt-image-2 model to the Nexior studio, enhancing the existing dropdown options. Users can now select the gpt-image-2:official model, which offers a higher tier service through the official relay channel. The update includes internationalization support across 17 locales, ensuring accessibility for a global audience.

items.title: Fix OAuth Client ID for WebExtrator in M C Ps 🚀
items.summary: This update resolves an issue with the OAuth flow for the WebExtrator MCP by registering the missing OAuth application in the AuthBackend and setting the appropriate client ID in the deployment configuration. The fix ensures that the authorization requests are valid, preventing errors during the OAuth process. The changes have been applied live and will persist through future deployments.

items.title: Update AKS Golden Image to v12 for Web Console Fix in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the AKS appliance golden image from v11 to v12, addressing a critical issue where the Wisdom package was missing the `index.html` file, resulting in a 500 error for tenants accessing the console. The new golden image has been verified on a live builder, ensuring that the console now returns a 200 status and operates correctly. The migration only modifies the image field while preserving other configurations.

items.title: Unify Output to Artifacts & Add Visibility Options in Nexior 🎉
items.summary: This update renames 'Output' to 'Artifacts' for consistency across the UI, addressing user confusion. Additionally, a new toggle for 'Show hidden' artifacts and an 'Unhide' button have been introduced, allowing users to recover previously hidden items. Concurrency protections have also been implemented to ensure data integrity during updates.

items.title: Enhance Connector Auth Method Selection in Frontend Web 🎉
items.summary: This update introduces a new method picker for connectors with multiple authentication methods, allowing users to select between options like 'Bring Your Own Credentials' and 'official OAuth'. The picker is now presented as a cleaner tabbed interface using Element Plus, improving user experience. Additionally, internationalization keys have been backfilled across 16 locales to support the new feature.

items.title: Enhance Fish TTS Guidance in Platform Service 🎤
items.summary: Updated the Maestro narrated Fish TTS guidance to align with the current `/fish/tts` contract. Key changes include documentation for `reference_id`, the `model: s2-pro` header, mp3 output, request timeouts, and handling sentence-level chunking for longer narrations. This ensures a smoother integration and improved user experience.

items.title: Enhance Instagram Token Help with New Scope in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update adds the `pages_show_list` scope to the Instagram connector's token help text, ensuring users can successfully auto-discover their IG accounts. Previously, the help text only included `instagram_content_publish` and `pages_read_engagement`, which could lead to empty page lists during discovery. Now, users are guided to generate tokens with the correct scopes for better functionality.

items.title: Enhance Instagram User ID Resolution in Skills 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the Instagram skill by enabling it to resolve the IG user ID from both Page and User access tokens. Previously, only the user-token path was utilized, which caused issues for users providing a Page token. Now, the connector first attempts to use the Page-token path, ensuring a smoother experience for all users.

items.title: Enable Anonymous Conversation Sharing in Nexior 🤝
items.summary: This update introduces a new feature allowing users to generate anonymous read-only links for conversations in Nexior. Users can easily share their chat sessions via a unique `/share/:id` link, enabling non-logged-in visitors to view the conversation without editing capabilities. Key changes include updates to the data model, new UI components for sharing, and enhanced internationalization support.

items.title: Refactor HTML Rendering for Service Introduction in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a dedicated `HtmlDocumentRenderer` to handle service introduction HTML, separating it from the `MarkdownRenderer`. This change prevents CSS conflicts that previously shrank related-service cards, ensuring they display correctly. The modifications enhance the rendering process and maintain a clean separation of responsibilities in the codebase.

items.title: Fix packaging to include web assets for console rendering in Wisdom 🚀
items.summary: This update resolves an issue where the Wisdom console failed to render at the root URL due to missing web assets. By modifying the package data to include the `web/**/*` files, the necessary `index.html` is now included in the installation, ensuring proper functionality. Future builds will benefit from this fix, although existing tenants will require a rebuild to access the console.

items.title: Enable Anonymous Access to Shared Conversations in Gateway 🚀
items.summary: This update allows anonymous users to access shared conversation links through the `/aichat2/shared` endpoint without authentication or billing checks. Key changes include the addition of this path to the public paths list and enhancements to the path normalization logic. New tests ensure that only the specified path is accessible anonymously while maintaining security for other endpoints.

items.title: Enable Anonymous Conversation Sharing in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces the ability for users to share their conversations anonymously via a unique URL, allowing others to view the conversation in a read-only format. Key changes include the addition of a new `shared_conversations` collection to manage shared data, and new API endpoints for sharing and unsharing conversations. The implementation ensures that sensitive information is redacted before sharing, enhancing user privacy.

items.title: Revamp Recommended Connectors in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a curated list of recommended connectors in the left sidebar, replacing the previous 'Available to Connect' section. The new setup features only the connectors marked as 'is_featured', simplifying the selection process for users. Additionally, a 'Browse All Connectors' button has been added for easy access to the full catalog.

items.title: Exciting New Instagram and Threads Connectors Added in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces two new BYOC publish connectors for Instagram and Threads, enhancing our connector offerings. The connectors are designed to streamline the publishing process using access tokens, following the established pattern for Facebook. Validation checks confirm the integrity and functionality of the new entries, ensuring a smooth integration into the existing system.

items.title: Updated PayPal Logo in Backend 🎨
items.summary: Replaced the PayPal public connector icon with a new white-background SVG asset. Both `icon_url` and `publisher_logo_url` now point to the updated CDN link. This change enhances the visual consistency of the PayPal integration within the application.

items.title: Updated Square Connector Logo in Backend 🎨
items.summary: Replaced the Square connector image with a new white-background SVG. Both `icon_url` and `publisher_logo_url` in the public connector seed have been updated to reflect this change. The previous CSS PR has been closed as this update directly addresses the image source.

items.title: Enhance Publishing with Instagram & Threads Skills in Skills 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces new publishing skills for Instagram and Threads, utilizing Meta's official APIs. Users can now publish images, videos, and carousels to their Instagram accounts and create text, image, or video posts on Threads, enhancing the connector-directory's capabilities. The implementation includes user confirmation for publishing and robust error handling.

items.title: Sync Tool Surfaces with API Docs for 8 Providers in M C Ps 🚀
items.summary: This update addresses discrepancies between the tool surfaces of eight MCP servers and their corresponding API documentation. Key changes include the addition of required parameters, correction of defaults, and the introduction of new optional parameters across various providers. The remaining providers were confirmed to be in sync, ensuring a more robust and accurate API integration.

items.title: Streamline Maestro Workflows in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update removes the replaced HyperFrames workflow skills and hyperframes-media from the maestro worker allowlist, streamlining the system. Additionally, the obsolete Fish TTS patch for hyperframes-media has been eliminated, ensuring a more efficient build process. These changes enhance the overall performance and maintainability of the Platform Service.

items.title: Fix URL issues for access request approvals in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update resolves a critical issue where the approve and reject URLs for access requests were missing trailing slashes, resulting in 404 errors. The changes ensure that the URLs now correctly include the trailing slashes, allowing administrators to approve or reject access requests without encountering errors. This fix enhances the overall functionality and user experience of the admin console.

items.title: Enhance Digital Human Flow with /avatar Feature in Platform Service 🤖
items.summary: This update introduces the new **/avatar** digital-human flow, enhancing the pipeline for creating talking-head videos. It includes a refined process for lip-syncing using seedance r2v, ensuring the embedded audio track is the final voice. Additionally, the flow now requires a portrait image or a digital human, improving the overall user experience and output quality.

items.title: Finalize Legacy Auth Column Removal in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This PR implements the second phase of the two-step removal process for legacy auth columns. It physically drops five outdated columns after ensuring that they are no longer referenced by any running pods. The migration is designed to maintain stability during the rollout, allowing for a safe transition without service interruptions.

items.title: Resolve migration conflicts to unblock production rollout in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new empty merge migration, `0193_merge_0192_leaves`, to resolve conflicts caused by two migrations with the same number. By merging the conflicting migrations, we ensure a smooth migration process without any schema or data changes. This fix is crucial for allowing platform-backend rollouts in production to proceed without issues.

items.title: Introducing the New Narrated Flow in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces the new '/narrated' flow skill, designed as an asset-first explainer to replace the previous HyperFrames' faceless-explainer. Key changes include a refined pipeline that integrates real assets, brand-kit styling, and Fish-direct audio for a more engaging user experience. The flow is now fully integrated with the existing video-factory and has passed all tests successfully.

items.title: Polish Vercel Logo for Consistency in Backend 🎨
items.summary: Updated the Vercel connector's icon and publisher logo URLs to a new white-background SVG for better visual consistency. This change ensures that both the marketplace and detail views render the logos uniformly. Validation tests have confirmed that the updates are functioning correctly.

items.title: Enhance video-factory to utilize style directive in Platform Service 🎨
items.summary: This update enables the video-factory to consume the new [STYLE DIRECTIVE], allowing for improved visual styling through brand-kit preset selection. The changes include modifications to the SKILL.md file, enhancing the documentation on how to apply styles effectively. This will streamline the rendering process and ensure a more consistent look across videos.

items.title: Update GLM Connector Icon in Backend 🎨
items.summary: The GLM connector catalog icon has been updated to a square CDN asset, ensuring a cleaner presentation. The original GLM mark has been cropped to a 720x720 size for better card rendering. Validation confirmed the new icon URL is functional and correctly formatted.

items.title: Update Face Transform Logo in Backend 🎨
items.summary: This update replaces the Face Transform connector catalog icon with a new square CDN-hosted logo while keeping the existing connector metadata intact. The change ensures that the visual representation aligns with current branding standards without affecting functionality.

items.title: Enhance Sentry Connector Logo for Better Visibility in Backend 🎨
items.summary: This update replaces the Sentry connector logo with a light-background SVG asset to improve legibility on dark connector cards. Both the `icon_url` and `publisher_logo_url` have been updated to point to the new asset, ensuring consistency across the platform.

items.title: Enhance Connector Search Functionality in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the connector search feature by normalizing search text to ensure better matching for short prefixes. The search now includes a broader range of metadata, such as identifiers and tags, enhancing the user experience. Additionally, it prevents issues with malformed text fields that could disrupt searches.

items.title: Exciting Plan to Host Connector UI in Nexior! 🚀
items.summary: This update outlines the plan to host the connector catalog and connections-manager UI within Nexior while maintaining `auth.acedata.cloud` as the OAuth broker. Key documents have been added, detailing the architecture, backend changes, and UI rollout strategy. This approach ensures a seamless user experience across all platforms without requiring major migrations or re-registrations.

items.title: Enhance brand-kit with Glass and Retro presets in Platform Service 🎨
items.summary: This update introduces two new brand-kit presets: Glass and Retro, enhancing the style parameter functionality. The Glass preset features frosted, translucent aesthetics, while Retro offers a vintage film look. These additions allow for more tailored visual experiences in video production, ensuring users can select styles that best fit their content.

items.title: Revamp Scenario to Flow Mapping with New Styles in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a significant redesign of the scenario-to-flow mapping in the maestro system, transitioning from the old `scenario_registry` to a new `flow_registry`. It adds backward-compatible aliases for existing public names and introduces a new orthogonal `style` parameter that allows for diverse visual design options. Comprehensive tests have been implemented to ensure functionality and compatibility.

items.title: Enhanced Technical Documentation for WeChat Automation Bot in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces comprehensive technical documentation for the Wisdom WeChat automation bot, detailing its architecture, deployment pipeline, and operational procedures. Key documents include an overview, architecture specifics, and a runbook for operations, all aimed at providing a single source of truth for this solution. These enhancements will improve clarity and support for developers working with the WeChat appliance.

items.title: Enhance OAuth Apps Page with Documentation Links in Frontend Web 📚
items.summary: This update adds a Documentation button on the OAuth Apps list page, linking users directly to the OAuth integration guide. An additional Documentation link is included in the empty state for first-time users, ensuring immediate access to essential information. The changes also include internationalization updates across 18 locales to maintain consistency.

items.title: Refine OAuth App Access for Superusers in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update modifies the OAuth application self-service endpoint to ensure that superusers can only view and manage their own OAuth applications, aligning with the behavior of other user-specific views. The change enhances security by preventing superusers from accessing other users' apps while maintaining oversight through the Django admin. New tests have been added to verify that both regular users and superusers see only their own applications.

items.title: Enhance AKS Access URL with Auth Token in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces the `url_with_auth` feature for the `aks_appliance` provider, allowing the console to open pre-authenticated. The change mirrors existing functionality in `tencent_cvm`, ensuring a seamless user experience by preventing 401 errors. Additionally, a migration has been added to include the `exposure.auth_param` in the Wisdom / WeChat-bot service metadata.

items.title: Streamline Service Installation for Channels in Coding Bridge 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new command, `coding-bridge channels install-service`, which simplifies the process of setting up user-level services for running channels at login or boot across different platforms. It generates the necessary service files for Linux, macOS, and Windows without requiring elevated permissions, ensuring a safer installation process. Additionally, comprehensive tests have been added to verify the functionality and security of the new feature.

items.title: Skip Billing for Memories API in Gateway 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a feature to skip billing for the `/aichat2/memories` endpoint, which handles metadata-only CRUD operations. The change ensures that calls to this endpoint do not trigger billing checks, while still allowing for user identity injection. The implementation was made by modifying the `can_skip_check` utility to recognize the specific API ID.

items.title: Registering Memories API for Aichat2 in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces the registration of the `/aichat2/memories` API row for long-term memory management in Aichat2. It allows for list, delete, and clear operations while ensuring that billing is skipped for this endpoint. The API is integrated with the existing Aichat service, maintaining consistent access policies across related endpoints.

items.title: Enhance Console UX for AKS Appliance with WeChat QR and Controls in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the single-VM appliance console UX by extending features from the Tencent CVM to the new AKS appliance. Key changes include the introduction of Stop/Start actions, the WeChat QR login card, and MCP channel card, ensuring that AKS tenants have the correct controls displayed. The console now dynamically adjusts based on the workload type, enhancing user experience and functionality.

items.title: Enhance UI with Elegant Scrollbars in Frontend Web 🎨
items.summary: This update introduces a sleek global scrollbar style to the Auth UI, ensuring consistency with the Nexior product. Key changes include a new SCSS file for the scrollbar and adjustments to the main style file for integration. The scrollbar is designed for desktop use, maintaining a subtle appearance that enhances user experience without being intrusive.

items.title: Enhance Global Scrollbars for a Sleek Look in Frontend Web 🎨
items.summary: This update introduces a refined global scrollbar style to the developer portal, ensuring consistency with the Nexior product. Key changes include a new SCSS file for a thin, elegant scrollbar that adapts to both light and dark themes, while maintaining usability across desktop devices. The implementation is non-invasive, allowing existing custom scrollbars to retain their unique styles.

items.title: Add Weibo Official OAuth for Dual Authentication in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces the Weibo OAuth adapter, enabling dual authentication with cookie and official OAuth methods. Key changes include the addition of the Weibo adapter, updates to the registry, and modifications to the settings and connectors configuration. Users will need valid Weibo credentials to fully utilize the official method, while the cookie method remains the default.

items.title: Fix connector migration issue for public connectors in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update addresses a migration oversight by converting the `connectors-public.yaml` into a compatible format for `auth_methods`. The fix ensures that the `connector-catalog-sync` CronJob runs successfully without errors, allowing for seamless catalog synchronization. Validation tests confirm that both `connectors.yaml` and `connectors-public.yaml` were upserted without any CommandErrors.

items.title: Enhance Portal with Live Daemon Status and Recent Turns in Coding Bridge 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a live daemon status feature to the portal, allowing users to see if the daemon is running and view recent turn metrics without exposing message content. Key changes include the addition of a heartbeat file and a bounded ring of recent turn metrics, enhancing observability and user experience. The implementation is supported by new tests to ensure reliability and performance.

items.title: Enhance Connector Authentication Method Selection in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new tab selection feature for connectors with multiple authentication methods, allowing users to easily choose their preferred method. A new component, ConnectorMethodPicker, has been added to facilitate this selection process, while existing components have been modified to support the new functionality. The implementation ensures a seamless user experience, maintaining the previous behavior for single-auth connectors.

items.title: Streamline Auth Methods for Connectors in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update transitions the authentication structure for connectors from multiple flat fields to a unified JSON array, enhancing data integrity and simplifying future migrations. Key changes include the addition of the `auth_methods` field, removal of legacy fields, and a comprehensive migration process to ensure a smooth transition. The implementation has been validated with extensive tests, confirming that all existing functionality remains intact.

items.title: Enhance Scheduled Tasks UX with In-Place Updates in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the Scheduled Tasks page by allowing in-place updates for toggling tasks, deleting, and saving edits, eliminating the disruptive full page refresh. The local tasks array is now mutated directly, providing instant feedback without a loading skeleton. Additionally, the fix addresses a false error toast issue during authorization confirmation cancellations.

items.title: Fix scheduler state toggle issues in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update resolves critical bugs in the scheduler state management for scheduled tasks. It ensures that toggling a task's state correctly updates the scheduler, preventing tasks from becoming permanently failed or incorrectly resumed. Additionally, it validates incoming state values to enhance system reliability.

items.title: Global Elegant Scrollbar Implementation in Nexior 🎨
items.summary: This update introduces a global elegant thin scrollbar for desktop and mouse users across the Nexior application, enhancing the user interface consistency. The new scrollbar design features a subtle appearance at rest and a more pronounced look on hover, adapting to dark mode using Element Plus tokens. The chat sidebar's previous custom scrollbar has been removed, allowing it to inherit the global styling.

items.title: Revamping Maestro's Scenario and Style Parameters in Index 🚀
items.summary: This PR introduces a comprehensive RFC design document aimed at redefining the scenario and style parameters within the Maestro workflow. Key changes include the reclassification of scenarios into four distinct production flows and the addition of a new style parameter that aligns with existing brand kits. This redesign aims to enhance flexibility and streamline the media generation process while retaining the use of the HyperFrames engine.

items.title: Fix migration conflict to unblock production rollout in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update renumbers the Wisdom AKS migration from 0190 to 0191, resolving a conflict that caused the production rollout to crash. The change repoints the migration's dependency to ensure a single linear migration path. As a result, the production rollout can proceed without any schema or data changes.

items.title: Enhance Memory Management UI in Nexior 🧠
items.summary: This update introduces a new 'Memory' tab in the settings dialog, allowing users to view, delete, or clear their assistant's long-term memory. Key changes include the addition of a dedicated UI component for memory management and backend support for memory operations. The feature enhances user control over stored information, ensuring a more personalized interaction with the assistant.

items.title: Enhance Media Previews with Fallbacks in Nexior 🎉
items.summary: This update introduces a fallback mechanism for failed chat rich media previews, reverting to file links when media cannot be displayed. Additionally, it applies the same fallback behavior to tool artifact previews and utilizes native `<video>` elements for non-embed video URLs, ensuring better error handling. These changes improve user experience by preventing blank previews and broken players.

items.title: Enhance Long-Term Memory Management in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new management endpoint for long-term memories with the addition of `POST /memories`. Users can now list, delete, and clear their memories, ensuring compliance with GDPR and privacy requirements. The implementation includes robust testing and follows the same authentication model as existing endpoints.

items.title: Midjourney MCP Restored and Enhanced in M C Ps 🚀
items.summary: The Midjourney MCP server source package has been successfully restored and integrated back into the MCPs monorepo. Key updates include re-enabling downstream sync, updating the OAuth provider, and adding regression coverage. Additionally, a standalone mirror repository has been created, ensuring better accessibility and management of the Midjourney MCP.

items.title: Update WebExtrator Documentation for HTML Fallback in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update replaces outdated Markdown files for the WebExtrator service introduction with new HTML sources across multiple locales. The changes ensure that the documentation sync process does not revert to broken Markdown formats, enhancing the user experience for non-Chinese locales. All service introduction translations have been updated to reflect these changes, ensuring consistency and accuracy.

items.title: Streamlined Telegram Allowlisting in Coding Bridge 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a one-click feature for adding recent Telegram senders to the allowlist, enhancing user experience during setup. The backend now includes a new method to peek at recent messages without affecting the message offset, ensuring no messages are lost. The frontend has been updated with a new button that allows users to easily load and select senders directly from their recent interactions.

items.title: Refactor resource names for WebExtrator in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update renames various Kubernetes resources related to WebExtrator to follow a consistent naming convention, now prefixed with 'platform-service-webextrator-'. Key changes include the creation of new deployments, services, and HPAs, along with the deletion of old resources. The deployment process has been hardened to ensure safe cleanup of old objects only after new ones are fully operational.

items.title: Enhance TTAPI Rollout Speed in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update optimizes the TTAPI rollout process by running production containers from the compiled `dist/server.js` instead of using `tsx`. It introduces a `startupProbe` for all TTAPI production deployments to prevent cold starts from being counted as failures and reduces the `minReadySeconds` from 120 to 30 seconds, allowing for quicker readiness checks. These changes aim to improve deployment efficiency and reduce downtime during updates.

items.title: Style(chat): remove sidebar horizontal scroll + elegant thin scrollbar in Nexior 🧹
Fix(deployment): wire production Wisdom AKS metadata in Backend 🐛
Fix(console): align usage trend days with client timezone in Frontend Web 🐛
Fix(usage): group aggregate days by client timezone in Backend 🐛
Fix(chat): 让用户发送与历史消息也显示复制按钮 in Nexior 🐛
Fix(webextrator): gate deploy on ready API endpoints in Platform Service 🐛
Fix(suno): suppress lyrics for instrumental requests in Platform Service 🐛
Fix(tse): avoid stale Kubernetes upstream targets in Index 🐛
Feat(aichat2): 长期记忆 P2 — 模型驱动 memory 工具（remember/list/forget） in Platform Service ✨
Fix(chat): restore cached conversations with empty summaries in Nexior 🐛
Fix(docs): refresh WebExtrator service intro in Backend 🐛
Feat(aichat2): 长期记忆 P1 — per-user profile 存储 + 后台抽取 + prompt 注入 in Platform Service ✨
Docs(skills): 发布后调 publish_artifact 记录产出（17 skills） in Skills 📝
Feat(chat): 产出物汇总页 /chatgpt/artifacts（我的产出） in Nexior ✨
Feat(api): register /aichat2/artifacts Api row (migration 0190) in Backend ✨
Feat(gateway): skip billing for /aichat2/artifacts (metadata-only CRUD) in Gateway ✨
Feat(aichat2): artifacts 产出物追踪（publish_artifact + 自动捕获 + /artifacts API） in Platform Service ✨
Docs(plans): connector 多认证方式（一卡 N auth，全面迁移） in Index 📝
Fix(console): slim, hover-only scrollbar for left sidebar in Frontend Web 🐛
Feat(portal): add / remove channel instances from the UI in Coding Bridge ✨
Chore(sandbox): 预装 tweety-ns(X/Twitter skill 依赖) in Platform Service 🔧
Fix(aichat2): 持久化 tool_display_name，修复刷新后工具名从「Web Page Fetcher」变回「web fetch」 in Platform Service 🐛
Docs(plans): aichat2 跨会话长期记忆设计（业界调研 + Mongo per-user profile 方案） in Index 📝
Fix(docs): earning 分类默认落地到 distribution 而非 promotion-github in Frontend Web 🐛
Feat(footer): 页脚新增「下载 App」与「路线图」入口 in Frontend Web ✨
Fix(nexior/download): drop hardcoded version labels; Windows/macOS to Releases page in Nexior 🐛
Fix(golden): AKS appliance boots turnkey + enforces auth in Wisdom 🐛
Enhance Artifact Tracking and Summary Design in Index 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a comprehensive design for tracking and summarizing artifacts generated by scheduled tasks in the Aichat2 system. Key changes include the creation of a new MongoDB collection for artifacts, an internal tool for artifact registration, and a dedicated API for displaying artifacts. This enhancement aims to improve visibility and accessibility of generated outputs, making it easier for users to track their tasks.

items.title: Streamline BYOC Authorization Experience in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update resolves an issue where two interfaces appeared during BYOC authorization, causing user confusion. By hiding the installation panel when the BYOC credential dialog is open, we ensure a cleaner user experience with only one visible dialog. Additionally, misleading text on the installation panel has been removed to maintain clarity.

items.title: Enhance README with Multi-Channel Driving Options in Coding Bridge 🚀
items.summary: This update modifies the README to highlight the multi-channel driving capabilities of the Coding Bridge agent, including browser, phone, WeChat, and Telegram. Key changes include an updated tagline and a new section detailing two ways to drive the agent, ensuring users can easily set up their preferred method. The documentation has been thoroughly checked for accuracy, with all links and commands verified.

items.title: Revamp X Connector to Cookie-Based Authentication in Backend 🚀
items.summary: The X connector has been transformed from a key-based OAuth 1.0a system to a cookie-based authentication method, aligning it with existing connectors like Weibo and Medium. Key changes include the removal of password fields, the introduction of required skills for automatic installation, and a new description emphasizing the use of an ACE plugin for login state capture. This update enhances usability for end-users by simplifying the connection process.

items.title: Introducing Cookie-Based X (Twitter) Skill in Skills 🚀
items.summary: This update adds a new cookie-based skill for X (Twitter) that allows users to interact with their accounts without needing API keys. Key features include posting tweets, searching, and reading timelines, all gated by a confirmation step to ensure safety. The implementation uses the `twikit` library to drive interactions, making it easier for users to engage with X directly from the platform.

items.title: Fix cookie/BYOC connector redirect issue in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update addresses a critical issue where the cookie/BYOC connector was redirecting to a 404 page after authorization due to a hardcoded return URL. The fix rewrites the return URL to point to the correct conversation route, ensuring a seamless user experience. Additionally, new tests have been added to validate the changes, all of which passed successfully.

items.title: Enhance Bluesky Image Posting Functionality in Skills 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new CLI script for the Bluesky skill, enabling users to post text and images seamlessly. The script automates the entire posting process, including session creation, image handling, and facet computation, eliminating previous shell-quoting issues. Comprehensive testing confirms that all functionalities work as intended, ensuring a smooth user experience.

items.title: Enhance Download Page with Back Button in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a back button to the chrome-less download page, addressing user navigation issues. The button allows users to return to the previous page or home, ensuring a seamless experience across web, iOS, Android, and desktop platforms. The implementation reuses existing localization keys and CSS styles for consistency.

items.title: Enhance Navigation with App Download Link in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update adds an 'App' entry to the top navigation bar of the platform site, linking directly to the download page for desktop and mobile applications. The change improves discoverability for users seeking to download the apps, aligning the platform with the existing Studio interface. Localization updates have been made for multiple languages to ensure accessibility.

items.title: Fix hover zoom scrollbar issue on service cards in Frontend Web 🎨
items.summary: This update addresses a horizontal scrollbar issue that appeared on service cards when hovered over, caused by the global stylesheet settings. By scoping the overflow property to the preview card body, the hover zoom effect now crops correctly without displaying a scrollbar. Additionally, it resolves a skeleton scrollbar flash on refresh, enhancing the overall user experience on the home page and service list.

items.title: Enhance Telegram Skill with Reliable Image Sending in Skills 🚀
items.summary: This update resolves issues with the Telegram skill's image sending functionality by shipping a new helper script, `tg.py`, that ensures reliable file handling across sandbox replicas. The `send-file` command now downloads images to a local temporary file before uploading, improving reliability and consistency. All existing commands remain intact, preserving the skill's functionality while enhancing its robustness.

items.title: Clean Up Dead Refresh Flow in M C Ps 🚀
items.summary: This update removes the obsolete refresh and offline_access flow from 21 per-service MCP servers, ensuring a more streamlined OAuth process. The changes eliminate unreachable code that could lead to confusion and potential issues, while maintaining the integrity of the durable credential system. All relevant tests have passed, confirming no adverse effects on existing client functionality.

items.title: New MCP Connectors for AceDataCloud in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces four new MCP connectors for AceDataCloud, including OpenAI, GLM, Grok, and WebExtractor. These connectors have been added to the connectors.yaml file, allowing users to access these services seamlessly. The OpenAI connector is prioritized at the top of the list, ensuring easy visibility and access for users.

items.title: Enhance Scheduled Tasks with Editable Title Field in Nexior ✏️
items.summary: This update reintroduces an editable task title field in the Scheduled Tasks dialog, allowing users to customize their task names. The new input field is integrated above the prompt input, ensuring a seamless user experience. Existing functionality remains intact, as empty titles will revert to auto-generated names, maintaining backward compatibility.

items.title: Streamline Access Token Management in M C Ps 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a durable, non-expiring platform token for the AceDataCloud connector, eliminating the need for users to re-authorize after each deployment. Key changes include the removal of the refresh token mechanism and the implementation of a new token minting process that ensures seamless access across pod restarts. Comprehensive tests have been added to validate the new functionality and ensure stability.

items.title: Enhance Platform Tokens with Tags and Metadata in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces `tags` and `metadata` fields to the `PlatformToken` model, allowing for better management of tokens. A new `?tag=` filter has been added to the list endpoint, enabling users to retrieve tokens based on specific tags. These changes aim to improve token reuse and reduce the need for re-authorization, enhancing the overall user experience.

items.title: Enhance Multi-Word Search Functionality in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a fan-out search feature for the public documentation search, allowing multi-word queries to return relevant results. The implementation includes a new `tokenize_query()` function to split queries into keywords and a `relevance_score()` function to rank results based on keyword matches. Unit tests have been added to ensure the reliability of the new functionality.

items.title: Update FontAwesome Icons to Latest Version in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the @fortawesome/free-brands-svg-icons package from version 7.2.0 to 7.3.0. Key changes include improvements and new icons as detailed in the release notes. This ensures our project benefits from the latest features and fixes.
